title: MineStudio
description: Client-side modpack with everything you need for creating movies in minecraft
body:
# MineStudio
Do you like to make movies in Minecraft? This modpack contains all tools you need to record good looking Minecraft movies with your friends. Modpack is client-side so only the recording player need to use it while actors can use Vanilla Minecraft.

## What is included?
- **Skin Overrides** - Change locally skins of other players
- **Wildfire's Female Gender Mod** - Change gender of ~~other~~ players (After last update you can't change other players gender. They need to use the mod as well or you need to modify config file)
- **Flashback** - Record your game and create cinematic shots (similarly to Replay Mode)
- **Camera Utils** - Zoom & other camera customizations
- **Axiom** - Awesome tool for builders to edit world
- **Preinstalled shaders**
  - BSL Shaders
  - Insanity Shader
  - Solas Shader
- **Preinstalled texture packs**
  - Bare Bones
  - Dramatic Skys
  - Even Better Enchants
  - Fresh animations + extensions
  - Motschen's Better Leaves
  - Round trees
- **FPS optimalizations**
